title: User equipment initiated data aided phase tracking reference signals on multiple layers of a communication link
abstract: Various aspects of the present disclosure generally relate to wireless communication. In some aspects, a user equipment may transmit a request, for an uplink transmission or a downlink transmission, for data aided phase tracking reference signals (PT-RSs) on multiple layers of a communication link; and communicate the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission based at least in part on the request. Numerous other aspects are provided.
claims:
Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A method of wireless communication performed by a user equipment (UE), comprising: transmitting a request, for an uplink transmission or a downlink transmission, for data aided phase tracking reference signals (PT-RSs) on multiple layers of a communication link; and communicating the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission based at least in part on the request. 2. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving the downlink transmission; and determining, based at least in part on the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, one or more of: a single common phase error (CPE) for multiple antennas associated with the multiple layers of the communication link, or CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 3. The method of claim 2, wherein determining the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas comprises: decoding data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, re -encoding the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, re-modulating the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, performing channel estimation based at least in part on the re-modulated data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, and determining, based at least in part on the channel estimation, the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 4. The method of claim 2, wherein determining the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas comprises: generating, based at least in part on descrambling the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, a soft data estimation per layer of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link; and 

 determining, based at least in part on an average of the soft data estimation per layer, the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the data aided PT-RSs on multiple layers of the communication link include a PT-RS sequence that is multiplexed with data. 6. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving an indication of a modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 7. The method of claim 6, wherein the indication of the modulation and coding scheme indicates a difference between the modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with the data aided PT-RSs and a modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with other data of the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission. 8. The method of claim 1, further comprising: transmitting an indication of a capability of the UE to communicate one or more of uplink transmissions or downlink transmissions with data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 9. The method of claim 1, wherein the request includes an indication of a capability of the UE to communicate one or more of uplink transmissions or downlink transmissions with data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 10. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving configuration information that indicates that a base station is to provide an indication of whether data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link is enabled. 11. The method of claim 1, further comprising: receiving an indication to communicate based at least in part on data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 12. The method of claim 11, wherein the indication to communicate based at least in part on data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link comprises: 

 an indication of the multiple layers for data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, or an indication of a modulation and coding scheme for data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 13. The method of claim 1, wherein data transmitted on resources associated with the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link is associated with a dedicated acknowledgement/negative acknowledgment (ACK/NACK) bit that is different from one or more ACK/NACK bits that are associated with other data communicated via the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission. 14. A user equipment (UE) for wireless communication, comprising: a memory; and one or more processors operatively coupled to the memory, the memory and the one or more processors configured to: transmit a request, for an uplink transmission or a downlink transmission, for data aided phase tracking reference signals (PT-RSs) on multiple layers of a communication link; and communicate the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission based at least in part on the request. 15. The UE of claim 14, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: receive the downlink transmission; and determine, based at least in part on the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, one or more of: a single common phase error (CPE) for multiple antennas associated with the multiple layers of the communication link, or CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 16. The UE of claim 15, wherein the one or more processors, when determining the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas, are configured to: decode data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, re-encode the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, 

 re-modulate the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, perform channel estimation based at least in part on the re-modulated data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, and determine, based at least in part on the channel estimation, the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 17. The UE of claim 15, wherein the one or more processors, when determining the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas, are configured to: generate, based at least in part on de scrambling the data of the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, a soft data estimation per layer of the data aided PT- RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link; and determine, based at least in part on an average of the soft data estimation per layer, the one or more of the single CPE for multiple antennas or the CPEs for respective antennas of the multiple antennas. 18. The UE of claim 14, wherein the data aided PT-RSs on multiple layers of the communication link include a PT-RS sequence that is multiplexed with data. 19. The UE of claim 14, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: receive an indication of a modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 20. The UE of claim 19, wherein the indication of the modulation and coding scheme indicates a difference between the modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with the data aided PT-RSs and a modulation and coding scheme for symbols associated with other data of the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission. 21. The UE of claim 14, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: transmit an indication of a capability of the UE to communicate one or more of uplink transmissions or downlink transmissions with data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 22. The UE of claim 14, wherein the request includes an indication of a capability of the UE to communicate one or more of uplink transmissions or downlink transmissions with data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 23. The UE of claim 14, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: receive configuration information that indicates that a base station is to provide an indication of whether data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link is enabled. 24. The UE of claim 14, wherein the one or more processors are further configured to: receive an indication to communicate based at least in part on data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 25. The UE of claim 24, wherein the indication to communicate based at least in part on data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link comprises: an indication of the multiple layers for data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link, or an indication of a modulation and coding scheme for data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link. 26. The UE of claim 14, wherein data transmitted on resources associated with the data aided PT-RSs on the multiple layers of the communication link is associated with a dedicated acknowledgement/negative acknowledgment (ACK/NACK) bit that is different from one or more ACK/NACK bits that are associated with other data communicated via the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission. 27. A non-transitory computer-readable medium storing a set of instructions for wireless communication, the set of instructions comprising: one or more instructions that, when executed by one or more processors of a user equipment (UE), cause the UE to: transmit a request, for an uplink transmission or a downlink transmission, for data aided phase tracking reference signals (PT-RSs) on multiple layers of a communication link; and communicate the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission based at least in part on the request. 28. The non-transitory computer-readable medium of claim 27, wherein the data aided PT- RSs on multiple layers of the communication link include a PT-RS sequence that is multiplexed with data. 29. An apparatus for wireless communication, comprising: means for transmitting a request, for an uplink transmission or a downlink transmission, for data aided phase tracking reference signals (PT-RSs) on multiple layers of a communication link; and means for communicating the uplink transmission or the downlink transmission based at least in part on the request. 30. The apparatus of claim 29, wherein the data aided PT-RSs on multiple layers of the communication link include a PT-RS sequence that is multiplexed with data.
